creator: rea@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm currently working on upgrading cups-pstoraster to the version
that will use the native GNU Ghostscript port, but this will take
up some time: a number of ports depend on the espgs, so they need
to be properly tested.
-- 
Eygene Ryabinkin                                        ,,,^..^,,,
